name: writing-loop
description: Autonomous short-drama writers' room: Showrunner/Story-Designer/Episode-Writer/Reviewer plus Script-Doctor, Evaluator, Sweep and Reflect, coordinated through ticket state on a local board, with a story bible + beat-card + ledger document system built to keep 60-100 episode vertical micro-dramas coherent.

plugins.name: writing-loop
plugins.description: Runs a script-writing loop coordinated through ticket state on a local file board. Each project is one drama: north-star bible, master outline, per-arc beat cards, foreshadow + story-state ledgers, episode scripts, and rubric-scored milestone evaluations (outline gate, first-paywall pack, finale). Supports novel-adaptation and original-creation intake.
